subcodes.first_line: We did indeed ornament the Laylat al-Qadr (Night of Destiny [Power]) with the Letter "H" to the end that the people of Baha' might be certain about this Greatest, Mighty Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد زینا لیله القدر بالهاء لیوقنن اهل البهاء بهذا الاسم الاعظم العظیم بها زین
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @Night of Power (Laylat al-Qadr), @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Greatest Name, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
